title: Journey
description: A modpack that focuses on improving performance and Minecraft's world generations with modded structures and more.
body:
# Journey

A Minecraft modpack that focuses on improving performance and world generation.

## To All Dungeons Crawlers

Powered by [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) and [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), dungeons are now much more diverse and difficult, but also hiding riches untold.

## Overhauled Villages

You feels like Vanilla Minecraft villages are too boring? Well look no further, because [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) and [Town and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers) have not only completely overhauled the villages, but also adding several more structures to your Minecraft world, keeping your explorer's spirit high.

## Enhanced Performance

Using many popular Minecraft optimization mods, Journey keeps your Gaming™ experience away from lags/frame-drop.

# Credits

- Modrinth Team
- CaffeineMC Team 
- Prism Launcher Team
- SuperMartijn642
- Spottedleaf
- GabrielDja 

And various other authors of the mods I've included in this modpack.

## External Links
